name: jj
description: Jujutsu (jj) VCS workflow guidance for colocated and standalone repos

interface.shortDescription: Jujutsu workflow guidance for colocated repositories.
interface.longDescription: Codex wrapper for the jj plugin. Reuses the existing jujutsu skill and keeps command and hook assets in the wrapper for repository-local workflow guidance.
defaultPrompt: Explain the current jj workspace state and next safe commands.
Help me rebase this change in a colocated jj plus git repo.
Show the safest way to finish and push this jj change.
